message:
refactor: remove daemon compat stub and --no-daemon flag (Phase 2)

Delete daemon_compat.go which contained the deprecated --no-daemon flag,
boolToFlag, truncateString, and formatUptime utility functions. Remove
dead isDaemonAutoSyncing code path from prime.go. Clean up --no-daemon
args from hook sync invocations and daemon config references.

Part of dolt-1s40: Dolt-Native Beads v2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -128,7 +128,6 @@ func runBDForCoverage(t *testing.T, dir string, args ...string) (stdout string,
 	dbPath = ""
 	actor = ""
 	jsonOutput = false
-	noDaemon = false
 	noAutoFlush = false
 	noAutoImport = false
 	sandboxMode = false

@@ -181,7 +181,6 @@ func runBDInProcess(t *testing.T, dir string, args ...string) string {
 	dbPath = ""
 	actor = ""
 	jsonOutput = false
-	noDaemon = false
 	noAutoFlush = false
 	noAutoImport = false
 	sandboxMode = false
@@ -934,7 +933,6 @@ func runBDInProcessAllowError(t *testing.T, dir string, args ...string) (string,
 	dbPath = ""
 	actor = ""
 	jsonOutput = false
-	noDaemon = false
 	noAutoFlush = false
 	noAutoImport = false
 	sandboxMode = false

@@ -212,8 +212,6 @@ func init() {
 	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVarP(&verboseFlag, "verbose", "v", false, "Enable verbose/debug output")
 	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVarP(&quietFlag, "quiet", "q", false, "Suppress non-essential output (errors only)")
 
-	// Note: --no-daemon is registered in daemon_compat.go as a deprecated no-op flag.
-
 	// Add --version flag to root command (same behavior as version subcommand)
 	rootCmd.Flags().BoolP("version", "V", false, "Print version information")
